"'''The Pentastar Alignment'''" was an article for the [[West End Games]] [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|Roleplaying Game]]. It was written by [[Tony Russo|Anthony P. Russo]] and illustrated by [[Chris Gossett]]. It was published in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]], and was reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''. Some of the illustrations were also reprinted in color in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]''.

The article detailed the [[Pentastar Alignment]], an Imperial faction led by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Ardus Kaine]].
